caption: The image is a four-panel collage showing various interactions between Joe Biden and Barack Obama, accompanied by the text, “I want someone to look at me the way Joe Biden looks at Obama.”

A screenshot of a tweet from Rahul Gandhi dated December 1, 2017, showing him posing with former U.S. President Barack Obama, both smiling, with the caption "Had a fruitful chat with President @BarackObama Great to meet him again."

The image is a two-panel meme featuring a photograph of Barack Obama smiling while holding up his hands to his ears, and a photograph of Osama bin Laden, with text that reads, "Obama called the SEALs and THEY got bin Laden" above the bin Laden photo, and "When the SEALs called Obama, THEY GOT DENIED" below the Obama photo, accompanied by a website URL.

The image shows a woman with a clown-like makeup featuring bright red lips, a red nose, and green eyeshadow, overlaid with text that reads, "We're more Stupid than you give us Credit for. Good Morning, Sunday Morning!"

The image is a meme featuring a collage of nine different political figures with the text "WE ARE LEADERS OF THE PARTY OF HATE, DIVISION & DESTRUCTION" overlaid, and a caption below stating, "This perfectly sums up the Democrat Party."

The image shows a group of children with red hair standing in front of several horses, with text overlaid that reads: "Irish were the first slaves brought to America. Does that mean we get paid 'slave reparations' first?"

The image shows five men standing side by side, each wearing brightly colored, patterned, matching outfits in pastel shades of green, pink, blue, purple, and yellow, with white belts, and the text above reads "FUTURE STAFFERS FOR" while the text below reads "THE 2020 DEMOCRATIC PARTY".
The image juxtaposes a historical painting of Louis XIV with the quote “L’État, c’est moi” and a modern photograph of Joe Biden with the caption “I AM THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” dated 9/29/2020.

The image shows a close-up of a woman with short, dark hair and a serious expression, wearing a light-colored top and a necklace, with text above and below the image that reads "THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP!" and "FOR EXPOSING THE TRUE FACE OF THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY!"
The image shows a Confederate battle flag with the text "THE DEMOCRAT PARTY" at the top and "AMERICAS OLDEST HATE GROUP" at the bottom.

The image is a black-and-white meme featuring a photo of Elvis Presley dressed in a Middle Eastern-style outfit, including a headscarf and robe, with text overlaid that reads, “WHAT DO YOU CALL A MUSLIM ELVIS IMPERSONATOR? AMAL SHOOKUP” and “BAN THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” at the bottom.
This is a meme featuring a photo of Joe Biden with the text "TBH" at the top and "WE COULD USE A BETTER NOMINEE" at the bottom.

The image is a meme featuring a central photograph of a woman with an exaggerated expression of excitement or joy, making a hand gesture, surrounded by smaller inset photos of various people in similar celebratory or enthusiastic poses, with bold yellow text at the top reading "THE FACE YOU MAKE" and black text at the bottom stating "WHEN YOU'VE SPENT HALF YOUR LIFE BEING BRAINWASHED BY THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY" along with the watermark "~AmericaRepublic~".

The image depicts a digitally altered portrait of Abraham Lincoln wearing a red "Make America Great Again" cap and aviator sunglasses, with text at the top reading "IRONY..." and a caption at the bottom stating, "THE PARTY WHO FREED THE SLAVES AND FOUGHT FOR CIVIL RIGHTS IS BEING CALLED 'RACIST' BY THE PARTY THAT OWNED THE SLAVES AND STARTED THE KKK."

The image is a two-panel meme: the top panel shows Kamala Harris with the text "This President fuels division and anti-Semitism!" and the bottom panel shows Donald Trump with a young boy labeled as his "Jewish grandson Joseph," with the text "This President with his Jewish grandson Joseph."

The image is a meme with the title "It's a Cult" at the top, followed by a photo of a large crowd at an event with the caption "The new Atheist / Communist Party" and "DEMOCRATS BOOED GOD." Below this, against a backdrop of a snowy mountain at sunset, is the text: "Crisis doesn't create character; it reveals it."

A man labeled "Me" looks down while a woman labeled "Memes on T_D" smiles at him, with another woman nearby holding a sign reading "My essay on why the Republican party is better than the Democratic party," and a caption below stating "Hope my professor isn't an NPC."

This image shows two side-by-side photographs of the Obama family: the left photo depicts them at the beginning of Obama's presidency, and the right photo shows them later, with the children grown taller and the dogs now adults.

The image displays four pictures of armadillos in various positions, accompanied by text that reads "THE NEW MASCOT FOR THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY" at the top and "IT ROLLS UP INTO A BALL WITH ITS HEAD UP ITS ASS TO AVOID REALITY" at the bottom.

The image is a side-by-side meme featuring Donald Trump on the left with his hair appearing windswept and Hillary Clinton on the right with a smirking expression, overlaid with the text "323 MILLION PEOPLE IN THE US ...AND THEY BRING IT DOWN TO THIS."
The image shows a pumpkin with a face resembling Donald Trump, featuring a caricatured expression, with text above and below posing a joke about their shared characteristics.

The image is a four-panel meme showing a progression of brain activity levels as different entities are claimed to do the most for the planet, culminating in a picture of Mr. Beast with the text “20,000,000 TREES!”

A black and white image of a crying child with text superimposed that reads, "I voted tactically for the Lib Dems to keep the Tories out," followed by a green banner stating, "TACTICAL VOTING HAS GOT US NOWHERE VOTE WITH YOUR HEART," and a logo for the Green Party at the bottom.
A woman and a chimpanzee are lounging on sunbeds, both wearing sunglasses, with text overlaid that reads, “Tina didn't dare mention the bride's bikini line.”

A man in a suit and glasses holds up a yellow card while sitting in what appears to be a game show audience, with overlaid text reading, "WELCOME TO THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY WHERE THE FACTS ARE MADE UP AND YOU'RE RACIST IF YOU DISAGREE."

A man in a suit and tie is speaking at a podium in front of a backdrop that reads "The White House, Washington," with a CNN news banner at the bottom stating "BREAKING NEWS: WITHOUT ANY EVIDENCE, TRUMP SAYS HE'S BEING CHEATED."

The image features a digitally altered depiction of Donald Trump with his head superimposed onto a character resembling Elsa from Disney's "Frozen," set against a backdrop of ornate, icy blue and white architecture, with the text "ELSA... DO YOU WANNA BUILD A WALL?" overlaid.
A Shiba Inu dog is sitting among green foliage with the text "I'm with the Green Party. Wanna party?" overlaid on the image.

The image is a meme titled "Famous Joe Biden quotes..." that lists several attributed quotes by Joe Biden from different years, and features two photos: one of Biden speaking, and another of him at a debate podium gesturing toward Donald Trump with the captions "You're a racist!" and "Will you shut up, man."
The image shows a quote attributed to VP Joe Biden, superimposed over a photo of him speaking at a debate while gesturing toward another man.

The image displays portraits of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris with overlaid text that reads, "We stood by and did nothing as we watched our colleagues let their Cities burn to the ground. But don't worry we are here to fix things now."

The image shows a split-screen with rapper T.I. on the left adjusting his sunglasses and wearing a pink shirt, and President Joe Biden on the right smiling in a suit, with a tweet overlay that reads, "I want Joe Biden, need Joe Biden or whatever TI said 😄".
The image is a three-panel collage showing three different men being awarded medals, with the word "RAPE" vertically aligned on the left side and "TEAM" vertically aligned on the right side.

The image is a meme featuring a photo of Hillary Clinton with large text overlay that reads, "The ONLY Bridges hillary's built Are EXIT Ramps," and additional text labeling various political parties with directional exit signs: "Green Party Exit LEFT," "Libertarian Party Next Exit," and "Republican Party Exit RIGHT," along with the phrase "Any Republican Can NOW Beat her" at the bottom.

A man in glasses and a suit is shown with text overlaid that reads: "LIVES IN ONE OF THE MOST FREE SOCIETIES ON THE PLANET" above his head and "COMPLAINS ABOUT NOT HAVING ENOUGH FREEDOM" below his chin.
A brown tabby cat is lounging on a beige cat tree with its front paws resting on the top edge, looking directly at the camera against a background of horizontal blinds.

A black and white image of two hands shaking, with text overlay that reads "GOOD IDEAS DON'T REQUIRE FORCE" and "LIBERTARIAN" along with a credit to the Libertarian Party of Florida and a URL for local involvement.

The image features a meme with a picture of George W. Bush at the top, labeled with his username and rank points, and a black bear below with the text “IF YOU ARE NOT AMERICAN YOU SHOULD STOP TALKING ABOUT AMERICAN POLITICS.”

The image is a meme that juxtaposes a photograph of a gorilla with a screenshot of a ballot showing “Harambe” as a write-in candidate, accompanied by the caption “Dead Gorilla Harambe Got Over 15,000 Votes To Become President Of The United States.”

The image shows a split-screen scene from a TV show, with the top half featuring a woman in a pink patterned blouse looking upward with a serious expression while the text "TAXATION IS THEFT" is overlaid, and the bottom half showing the same woman standing beside a man in a white shirt who is looking down at a desk.

The image shows two men in suits, one smiling and looking at the other, with a text overlay that reads, “Don’t ever let anyone ever get away with telling you that a vote for a third party is wasted. What were the votes for these guys? An investment?”

The image shows a shirtless man with a beard raising his arm in front of a "LIBERTARIAN" sign at the Libertarian Party National Convention in Orlando, Florida, with text overlaid that reads "STILL LESS EMBARRASSING THAN HILLARY CLINTON."

The image is a three-panel meme featuring Donald Trump pointing at a "VOTE TRUMP 2016" billboard, followed by a man pointing and saying, "THAT'S A NICE WALL YOU GOT THERE," then "IT WOULD BE A SHAME IF SOMEONE...," and finally "CLIMBED IT."

A man with dark curly hair and a serious expression, wearing a dark jacket against a snowy background, with bold white text overlaid that reads, "I'M NOT SITH I'M ALT-JEDI YOU CULTURAL REBEL CUCK," and below it, "No, 'Clovergender' is NOT a Thing! - Libertarian Party of Nevada."

A tweet from the Libertarian Party of New York featuring a meme with two caricatures: one crying and asking, "What are you doing?? We're only supposed to care about money!!", and the other stating, "Systemic racism and LGBTQ+ oppression are the enemies of liberty and I will fight them with my last breath," with the word "Right" above them.

The image is a meme featuring a painting of the Founding Fathers, overlaid with text that reads "FOUNDING FATHERS HERE'S THE FIRST AMENDMENT" and "OH AND IN CASE SOMEONE TRIES TO TAKE THAT AWAY HERE'S THE SECOND AMENDMENT," with a credit at the bottom thanking the Libertarian Party of Florida for the post.

The image shows a hand holding a small bag or packet, with the text "LEGALIZE RECREATIONAL COCAINE." prominently displayed, alongside the Libertarian Party logo, against a dark background with out-of-focus lights.

A man with a mustache wearing a light-colored cowboy hat and vest looks downward with a serious expression, set against a background that appears to be an indoor public space with decorative lighting, overlaid with bold text reading "I'M STARTING TO THINK THIS ENTIRE ADMINISTRATION WAS HOMESCHOOLED BY BETSY DEVOS."

A group of people stand on a stage in front of a backdrop that reads "LIBERTARIAN," with a meme text overlay stating, "AND AS A REMINDER NONE OF US ARE ACTUALLY MEMBERS OF THE LIBERTARIAN PARTY AND THAT KEEPS US FROM HAVING TO BE EMBARRASSED BY ASSOCIATION WITH OURSELVES."
A man in a cluttered room holds a phone to his ear while looking puzzled, with the caption "HAVE YOU TRIED TURNING IT OFF AND ON AGAIN?" overlaid on the image.

Two men in suits are standing at podiums on a debate stage with animated lightning bolts visually connecting them, overlaid with text indicating a CNN Democratic presidential debate topic about political revolution versus improving the system.

The image is a two-panel meme featuring a man in a casino setting; in the top panel, he is smiling with text overlay “Me talking about how bad Biden-Harris is” and a woman beside him labeled “Republicans thinking I’m pro Trump”; in the bottom panel, the man looks shocked as he covers his mouth, with text overlay “F**k” and the same woman looking at him.
The image shows Joe Biden in a suit and tie, gesturing with both hands near his chest, with white text overlaid that reads, "DON'T BRING INDEX CARDS TO A KNIFE FIGHT NEXT TIME UNCLE JOE."

The image shows two side-by-side photos from the CNN First Presidential Debate, featuring Donald Trump on the left and Joe Biden on the right, with a caption below attributing the quote "Shut up man. This is so unpresidential. Keep yapping, man." to Joe Biden.

The image shows a woman with short brown hair and glasses, wearing a white jacket over a red top and a red beaded necklace, holding papers and smiling, with text overlaid that reads “The new mascot of the Republican Party,” “A deranged and ignorant,” and “middle-aged hulibily with bad hair.”

A black background features a red stylized eagle with outstretched wings above a circular emblem with a skull and octopus-like tentacles; to the left is a caricature of a man labeled “ORANGE HITLER,” and beneath the emblem the text “THE NEW REPUBLICAN PARTY” is displayed, followed by a caption reading “Tell them you found it at Rude and Rotten Republicans.”

The image is a political graphic with a dark blue background that reads "WHAT DOES GOP REALLY STAND FOR?" at the top, followed by the phrase "GREED OVER PEOPLE" in large white and red letters, and includes the website "CADOF.ORG" and the hashtag "#GreedOverPeople" at the bottom.
The image shows two individuals in white robes and hoods, one holding a Confederate flag, with the text "KKK-ISIS" and "SAME TRAILER-DIFFERENT PARK ~R." overlaid on the picture.

A screenshot of a tweet by Pixie Casey showing two men in suits seated at a dining table, with a caption that reads “She knew it was better to be in the Plastics, hating life, than to not be in at all.”

The image features a man in military attire with a helmet and a cigar in his mouth, set against a blurred green background, with text overlay reading “THE REPUBLICAN PARTY” at the top and “JUST WENT FULL RETARD” at the bottom.

The image is a social media post featuring text stating that according to WSJ, Trump lawyer Michael Cohen paid Stormy Daniels $130K to keep quiet about a sexual encounter with Donald Trump, accompanied by photos of Trump, Stormy Daniels, and a caption that reads "THE BIGGEST SHOCK IS THAT TRUMP ACTUALLY FOLLOWED THROUGH PAYING SOMEONE."

A man in a suit and tie is pointing with his right index finger while looking slightly to his right; text overlaid on the image reads, "I DON'T TRUST YOU TO MAKE A CHOICE, BUT YOU'D MAKE A DAMN GOOD PARENT."

A man with an angry, exaggerated facial expression, his eyes wide and mouth open as if yelling, with his hands raised near his face, set against a yellow background with the text “Angry Liberal tantrum” at the top and “Why is facebook allowing all these people to disagree with me???“ at the bottom.

A man in a black shirt stands among four women in revealing outfits in front of a neon sign that reads “BUNNY BAR,” with text above the photo stating, “Hey, look who stopped by the Moonlight Bunny Ranch Brothel... it's @seanhannity! *I'm sure he just stopped by for a drink.”

A blue and white sign for St. Catherine Episcopal Church features a message on a marquee board that reads, "GOV. PERRY, GOD HERE. THE VOICE IN YOUR HEAD IS NOT ME. TAKE YOUR MEDS. CHOIR PRACTICE WED. 7 P.M."

The image shows Donald Trump pointing forward while standing in front of American flags, with a text overlay that reads: "Trump could shoot someone on the Senate floor and still be acquitted 53-47. Unless he shot a republican. Then it would be 52-47."

A person stands in a grassy yard wearing a dark jacket over a brown dress with a light grey turtleneck, white knee-high socks, and dark flat shoes, with the text "Just your average Green party voter" above them.

A three-panel meme using "The Final Countdown" ice skating routine to illustrate a satirical progression of U.S. political cycles: the first panel shows people sliding left for "US politics every 8 years," the second shows them sliding right for "US politics every other 8 years," and the third shows them criss-crossing for "US politicians re-authorizing endless wars & domestic spying."

The image is a meme featuring two side-by-side panels: the left shows a person with glasses looking confused or overwhelmed, labeled "Me commenting on US politics," and the right shows a man with glasses looking perplexed, labeled "Me commenting on the politics of my own country." Below them, text reads, "Wait, Stephen Harper is still the Canadian president, right?"

The image is a two-panel meme: the left panel shows a jar filled with various discarded items and text overlay reading "Sinking deeper and deeper into 2020" and "The days blending together," while the right panel features a scene from Willy Wonka where characters are in a tunnel boat with the caption "I think 2020 is the historical equivalent of the tunnel boat scene in Willy Wonka [SCREAMING]."

A black-and-white image shows three women in nurse uniforms with surprised or shocked expressions, with text above them reading "READY FOR THE NEXT DISTRICT!" and below reading "IOWA CAUCUS VOTE COUNT."
The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump with a slight smirk, accompanied by the text "When someone says Democrats will win in 2020."

The image is a composite showing two men, one on the left eating a sandwich and the other on the right looking surprised, with the text "THE LOST VERSION OF PLANES, TRAINS & AUTOMOBILES" overlaid at the bottom.

The image is a collage of various memes and photos with the headline "Is Nevada Done Counting Votes Yet?" and a subtitle reading, "Who knows! Meantime, here are the best memes poking fun at the Silver State's slow pace" by Andrew Kiraly.

The image is a meme titled "THINGS THAT GO FASTER THAN NEVADA VOTE COUNTING," featuring three panels: "WATCHING GRASS GROW" with a close-up of green grass, "WATCHING SNAILS CRAWL" with a snail on pavement, and "WATCHING PAINT DRY" showing a man sitting on a chair facing a wall.
A police officer is walking a dog with a superimposed image of Joe Biden's face on its head, under the text "Don't worry ma'am, we'll find your missing daughter."

A meme split into two sides, featuring Donald Trump on the left with text "Yes, two Nobel Peace noms. in one week." and Joe Biden on the right with text "OOPS! I MADE POOPY," under the header "Debate preview:" and with the watermark "@two_deplorable_ladies" vertically between the two images.

A screenshot of a Twitter post showing a photo of Joe Biden and Barack Obama smiling and interacting, with a tweet overlaid that reads: "Joe: Hey Barack, why does Trump wanna ban pre-shredded cheese Barack: Joe please Joe: TO MAKE AMERICA GRATE AGAIN Barack: I swear to God".
A man in a suit and tie looks out from behind a glass door with a serious expression, with a plant visible in the foreground.

A screenshot of a tweet by Brendan Bergen showing a photo of Joe Biden and Barack Obama seated side by side, with Biden looking towards the camera and Obama covering his face with his hands, overlaid with a fictional dialogue attributed to them about "draining the swamp" and Shrek.
A political meme featuring a photo of Joe Biden with speech bubbles listing vulgar phrases, juxtaposed with the text "Democrats: Trump is vulgar and not presidential" and "The Democrat frontrunner:".

The image is a three-panel meme: the top panel shows a person in a green coat with the text "DON'T SHOOT! I'M RETARDED"; the middle panel depicts soldiers in a snowy, war-torn setting with the text "PROVE IT"; and the bottom panel features a person in a green coat with a "BIDEN" face mask, making hand gestures.
The image shows two men in suits seated at a table; one man, standing and leaning over the other, appears to be speaking to him in a hushed tone while both look forward.

The image is a two-panel meme; the top panel shows a person in a suit with the text "I'VE SERVED THIS COUNTRY FOR DECADES," while the bottom panel features a person with an afro hairstyle sitting at a game show podium with the text "WHAT IS CHINA."
A woman sits on a couch looking distressed while a therapist, holding a notepad, offers a sarcastic response to her complaint about lacking alone time.

A screenshot of a tweet from the BLM account stating, “Dear dumb ass white people 🤯 if you use a persons skin color as an insult you are racist... #Stopbeingsowhite 🤖”, accompanied by a meme image of a person holding their head in disbelief.
The image shows a man seated at a table with a bottle and a glass in front of him, captioned “HUNTER BIDEN” at the top and “WATCHING THE DEBATE” at the bottom.

The image is a meme featuring a game show setup where a host asks, "NAME SOMETHING THAT TRIGGERS THE LEFT," and a scoreboard displays various topics with associated point values, including "TRUMP 35," "PATRIOTISM 20," "TAX CUTS 15," "FREE SPEECH 8," "CONSTITUTION 8," "PERSONAL RESPONSIBILITY 6," "JUSTICE BRETT KAVANAUGH 4," and "RED HATS 4."
A meme featuring a comic-style dialogue between two political figures, where one asks the other if they fell from heaven, and the other replies that they remind them of Lucifer.

The image features a historical battle scene with soldiers in red coats and white trousers, some on horseback and others on foot, engaged in combat amidst smoke and chaos, overlaid with bold white text reading "I BETTER LISTEN TO THE GOVERNMENT AND TURN IN MY GUNS" at the top and "SAID NO AMERICAN EVER" at the bottom, and a black banner with the handle "@mr_young_republican" in the center.
The image displays a young man wearing a red cap, smiling slightly while looking to the side, with text above him asking if everyone can show respect for the highest paid person at CNN and WaPo.
A man, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a car, holding a handgun pointed out the window, with the text "GET IN, PUSSY" at the top and "WE'RE MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" at the bottom.
The image displays a side-by-side comparison of Donald Trump on the left and the internet meme character Annoying Orange on the right, with the text "LOOK FAMILIAR?" at the bottom.

The image shows a close-up of a person's face with their mouth covered by a wide strip of gray duct tape, overlaid with bold white text reading "HOW TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN" at the top and bottom.

The image shows a smiling portrait of Barack Obama with an American flag in the background, overlaid with text that reads "BREAKING NEWS: new third party candidate Oarack Bobama enters the race for the presidency."
The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump making a puckered-lip expression, with the text "ORANGE IS THE NEW BLACK" superimposed over the image.

A meme image depicting two men in suits, one with his hand on the other's cheek, with text above them that reads "Biden: I changed White House wifi password to 'ILoveMexicans', if Trump wins, hes never gonna have service" and "Obama: you savage af Joe".

The image shows former U.S. President Barack Obama in a bright green patterned suit standing in what appears to be an official setting, with text overlaid at the top and bottom reading "OBAMA'S LEGACY" and "OF HORRIBLE DECISIONS CONTINUES..." respectively.

The image displays two side-by-side pictures of foxes, with the left showing a majestic fox labeled "Libertarian Ideas" and the right showing a scruffy, less appealing-looking fox labeled "Libertarian Candidates."
A man in a suit stands before a White House backdrop with a caption that reads, "Basically I'm here to announce that we're building Iron Man."
